plan_status: adopted (interim plan effective 10 August 2022, following Ministerial Direction)
fetch_method: curl.exe raw PDF download + WebFetch of consult.mayo.ie HTML chapter for extraction
notes: Dedicated Volume 2 DM Standards chapter. Rich quantitative extract via the HTML chapter on consult.mayo.ie: density (35/20/5 du/ha), rural one-off site 2000m2 (3000m2 coastal), 22m/35m separation, X/Y/Z visibility, road setbacks 40/20/10m, full parking + EV (10%/20%) + bicycle + bin standards. AA/EIA/heritage triggers are partial in Volume 2 (operational FRA/TTA/site-suitability triggers captured).
